name: French Mushroom Sauce with Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the mushrooms and sauté until their moisture has evaporated.
3. Stir in the flour, coating the mushrooms thoroughly.
4. Mix in the wine and milk. Heat until the mixture thickens.
5. Season with salt and lemon juice to taste.
6. Whisk 1 tablespoon of the heated sauce into the beaten egg yolks.
7. Combine the tempered yolks back into the remaining sauce.
8. Heat slowly over low heat, without boiling.
9. Add the shrimp and serve hot alongside fish.
